sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5657" key="a)mfala/lhmai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφᾰλάλημαι</orth>, <sense id="n5657.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wander round about,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:423" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.423</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
